Diag|MultilineOvlyinit|_SOME_FUNCTION|GG.description:
Function: _SOME_FUNCTION

This function takes a pointer to a `GG` object as input, but ignores it and returns an integer value. It is likely intended for future use in a larger system where the `GG` object is initialized elsewhere, and currently serves as a placeholder or stub.

Diag|PreprocIfFunction|_SOME_FUNCTION|.description: This function provides a default return value of 0, serving as a placeholder until actual implementation can be provided. It has no side effects and does not modify global state.

Diag|PreprocIfFunctionThen|_SOME_FUNCTIO.description: Calls _SOME_FUNCTION if true, otherwise does nothing.

Diag|VoidAsVar|_SOME_FUNCTION|int.description: Does nothing with a void argument.

Diag|VoidIsVoid|_ok_when_void_is_void|in.description: Checks if a void is indeed void and returns 0.
